title: allantodia doederleinii
intro: Allantodia doederleinii, also known as the Doederlein's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in East Asian medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Allantodia doederleinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in powder form for topical applications.
